scripts.test:headed: npm run bdd:gen && cross-env HEADLESS=false playwright test
scripts.test:headless: npm run bdd:gen && cross-env HEADLESS=true playwright test
scripts.test:qa: npm run bdd:gen && cross-env ENV=qa playwright test
scripts.test:qa:headed: npm run bdd:gen && cross-env ENV=qa HEADLESS=false playwright test
scripts.test:uat: npm run bdd:gen && cross-env ENV=uat playwright test
scripts.test:uat:headed: npm run bdd:gen && cross-env ENV=uat HEADLESS=false playwright test
scripts.test:api: npm run bdd:gen && playwright test --project api
scripts.test:browser: npm run bdd:gen && playwright test --project chrome
scripts.test:sfdc: npm run bdd:gen && playwright test Features/sfdc
scripts.test:web: npm run bdd:gen && playwright test Features/web
scripts.test:appian: npm run bdd:gen && playwright test Features/appian
scripts.test:fiori: npm run bdd:gen && playwright test Features/fiori
scripts.test:sap: npm run bdd:gen && playwright test Features/sap
scripts.test:e2e: npm run bdd:gen && playwright test Features/e2e
scripts.test:qa:tag: npm run bdd:gen && cross-env ENV=qa playwright test --grep
scripts.test:uat:tag: npm run bdd:gen && cross-env ENV=uat playwright test --grep
scripts.test:qa:file: npm run bdd:gen && cross-env ENV=qa playwright test
scripts.test:uat:file: npm run bdd:gen && cross-env ENV=uat playwright test
scripts.test:uat:web:tag: npm run bdd:gen && cross-env ENV=uat playwright test Features/web --grep
